messages.description: AppShell bootstrap started.
Registry-backed command dispatch began.
AppShell entered a resolved mode surface.
Structured refusal emitted by AppShell.
TUI backend degraded to the deterministic lite fallback.
TUI console session executed a command.
TUI surface was built and is ready for presentation.
Client refused the negotiated degrade mode.
Negotiation acknowledgement mismatch was refused.
Read-only compatibility mode was negotiated.
Compatibility negotiation refused the connection.
Compatibility negotiation completed successfully.
Deterministic DIAG-0 repro bundle was written.
Deterministic diagnostic snapshot bundle was written.
A negotiated IPC attach session was accepted.
An IPC attach session was refused explicitly.
A deterministic local IPC endpoint started.
A deterministic local IPC endpoint stopped.
Pack lock generation completed.
Offline pack verification completed.
Loopback client connection accepted.
Loopback control request processed.
Loopback listener bound.
Proof anchor emitted for the current tick.
Authoritative server tick advanced.
A supervised child host received a deterministic crash request.
A supervised child host reached IPC-ready state.
A supervised child host ignored a non-control stdin command.
A supervised child host received a deterministic stop request.
Launcher attached to supervised child IPC endpoints.
Launcher started the supervisor service.
Launcher requested deterministic supervisor shutdown.
Supervisor spawned and attached a child product host.
Supervisor restarted a child product under policy.
Supervisor service booted and published its IPC endpoint.
Supervisor completed deterministic startup.
Supervisor completed deterministic shutdown.
Refinement scheduler summary emitted.
